name: Atelier Noir
hours_note: Single seating. Reservation required. Jacket suggested, not required.

reviews.author: Claire D.
reviews.text: Seven courses, no menu choices — you trust the kitchen. The langoustine course alone justified the reservation three months out.

reviews.author: Henrik A.
reviews.text: Service is invisible until you need something. Wine pairings are thoughtful without being lectured at.

items.name: Seasonal tasting
items.description: Seven courses. Dietary restrictions with 48-hour notice.

items.name: Langoustine
items.description: Signature course — Brittany, butter emulsion, citrus

items.name: Pre-dessert
items.description: Palate cleanser before the pastry course

faq.question: Is there an à la carte menu?
faq.answer: No. All guests receive the seasonal tasting menu.

faq.question: How far in advance should I book?
faq.answer: Reservations open on the first of each month for the following month. Weekends fill within hours.

private_dining_note: Salon privé for up to 10 guests. Chef's table available on request.
owner_provided_notes: Reservation-only tasting menu. Single seating, Wednesday through Saturday.
headline: Seasonal tasting, single seating
